# Alex Tsilingiris

> Data & AI Strategist. I lead AI and Data initiatives—from strategy to production.

## About

Alex Tsilingiris is a Data & AI Strategist working across Artificial Intelligence, Generative AI, Agentic AI, Machine Learning, MLOps, AI Transformation, Data Science, Data Strategy, Analytics Engineering, and Cloud Architecture.
